title: switch klein 4B from Modal to bpaigen.com
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Fresh pipes for Klein 4B
gist.blurb: We've rewired the Klein 4B model to use a shiny new dedicated provider. It's now laser-focused on pure text-to-image generation, leaving the heavy lifting to its big sibling.
gist.summary: Switched the backend provider for the Klein 4B image model from Modal to bpaigen.com, optimizing it specifically for text-to-image generation.
gist.impact: Klein 4B now runs on a new dedicated pipeline focused entirely on text-to-image generation, while Klein Large (9B) remains unchanged.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny tool belt, working with the Monitor Robot to plug a glowing new cable into a retro server labeled 'KLEIN'. The robot looks excited about the new connection.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny tool belt, helping a chunky Monitor Robot plug a glowing lime green (#ecf874) cable into a retro server rack. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
